concerns.text: FR-006 requires fixed-effects regression with dataset and model as fixed covariates. Tasks T040-T044 implement OLS regression instead without explicit justification in task descriptions. Plan.md acknowledges this deviation but tasks must reflect the constraint or document the formal change.

FR-006 explicitly requires base rate difference as a predictor for metric discrepancies. Plan.md Phase 4 excludes it citing 'theoretical circularity' but tasks do not implement this exclusion explicitly, creating a spec-plan-task mismatch.

Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned throughout code/ for reproducibility. Tasks only mention seed pinning for model training (T025-T026), not for data acquisition (T014-T015) or preprocessing (T016-T019) pipelines where stratified sampling also requires seeds.

Constitution Principle VII requires effect sizes documented for all statistical claims. T042 mentions 'effect size bounds' but does not specify which effect sizes (e.g., Cohen's f², R²) must be documented for regression results, weakening the statistical rigor requirement.

Plan.md Phase 3 Step 3 requires excluding DP-difference vs DI-ratio correlation pairs due to mathematical dependency. Tasks T036-T039 do not explicitly implement this exclusion, creating a gap between plan intent and task deliverable.

FR-007 allows bootstrap reduction from 1000 to 500 iterations if needed. T047 logs reductions but no task proactively monitors the 6-hour GHA window to adjust iterations before timeout, creating a potential runtime failure scenario.
